codeReview.summary: Pass. The reviewed commit removes the `local` Cargo feature wiring, switches `ort` to runtime-loaded `load-dynamic`, makes local embedding/reranking code unconditional, and preserves graceful runtime messaging when API env vars or ONNX Runtime are unavailable. The current file state still matches the feature description and expected behavior, and I did not find any blocking or non-blocking code defects in the reviewed scope.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The implementation-worker skill requires manual verification for feature-flag removal by checking that `--local` still appears in `vera --help`, but the reviewed worker transcript skeleton shows no `--help` verification even though the handoff marked `skillFeedback.followedProcedure` as true. Either the skill procedure is stricter than what workers are expected to do for core-only changes, or the self-reported procedure adherence is too optimistic.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: .factory/skills/implementation-worker/SKILL.md:42-46 requires manual verification and specifically says to verify `--local` in `vera --help`. In the extracted transcript skeleton for worker session `eb29d72e-285f-4ab1-bcbb-537b216c0b94`, string checks found `cargo build --release`, `cargo test --workspace`, `cargo clippy --workspace -- -D warnings`, and `cargo fmt --all -- --check`, but no `vera --help`, `index --help`, `search --help`, or `update --help` commands.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The shared environment library has not been updated to capture the new runtime ONNX behavior introduced by this feature. It documents quantized model downloads, but it still says there are no other external dependencies and omits the ONNX Runtime shared-library requirement plus the `ORT_DYLIB_PATH` escape hatch.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: .factory/library/environment.md:20-23 documents local inference models and quantized downloads, but line 32 says `No other external dependencies`. The reviewed implementation adds explicit ONNX Runtime loading and custom path support in `crates/vera-core/src/local_models.rs:23-50` and `:48-50`, including `ensure_ort_runtime()` and `ORT_DYLIB_PATH`. Mission guidance already mentions the runtime dependency at `/home/lamim/.factory/missions/291889bc-b994-4be9-95b4-d1a630b822cf/AGENTS.md:57`, so the project library is the lagging shared-state source.

summary: Reviewed feature `remove-feature-flags-core` at commit `faebfde` against its handoff, transcript skeleton, diff, and current code. The implementation satisfies the scoped install-simplification requirements and preserves graceful local-runtime behavior, so the feature passes review; I noted one skill-procedure mismatch and one missing shared-environment note for future shared-state upkeep.
